title: Not easy to be CJI; he works 17-18 hours a day: Supreme Court Justice MM Sundresh
description: Supreme Court Justice MM Sundresh recenly spoke about the demanding nature of the Chief Justice India's role.He was among the dignitaries present for the inauguration of additional court buildings at the Madurai District Court campus and a guest house for the Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court.Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant was also present at the event which took place on April 19, Sunday. “It is not easy to be the Chief Justice of this great country.
